[config_gitlab_usage.txt](config_gitlab_usage.txt) Golden CLI output showing GitLab configuration command usage and examples.
[help.txt](help.txt) Golden top-level `ploy` help output used by command help tests.
[help_mig.txt](help_mig.txt) Golden `ploy mig` help output used by MIG command help tests.
[jobs_follow_structured.txt](jobs_follow_structured.txt) Structured follow-mode jobs output fixture for CLI rendering tests.
[migs_logs_raw.txt](migs_logs_raw.txt) Raw MIG logs fixture used to validate unstructured log printing paths.
[migs_logs_structured.txt](migs_logs_structured.txt) Structured MIG logs fixture used to validate parsed log presentation.
